description: A White House quote-card graphic. The full-bleed background is a desaturated black-and-white photograph of Donald Trump seated in a tufted leather chair in an interior setting, looking toward the camera with an American-flag lapel pin visible. A dark vignette frames the image. Overlaid in the lower portion is a white social-media post card with Trump's circular American-flag-painted avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump' with magenta verification and black subscription badges, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The quoted post text reads: 'I will soon be reviewing the plan that Iran has just sent to us, but can’t imagine that it would be acceptable in that they have not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP', with the first line highlighted in yellow marker. At the bottom center is the engraved White House building logo with 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: 'I will soon be reviewing the plan that Iran has just sent to us, but can’t imagine that it would be acceptable in that they have not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years.'
